mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (email, password, name, phone, role, status) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, COALESCE(#{role}, 'USER'), COALESCE(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'))
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET last_login_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE member SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
